identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Swiss Design with Organic Trust.
Emotion First: Accounting is stressful; the design must be calming yet authoritative.
Content is King: Guide the user like a wise mentor.
Negative Space: Don't clutter. Data needs room to breathe.

primary.description: Emerald Green - Represents wealth, growth, and stability.

secondary.description: Vibrant Orange - Use sparingly for high-priority CTAs to grab attention.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous (2x standard). Use p-8, p-12 for sections. p-6 for cards.

landing_page.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A). Mix large hero blocks with smaller feature squares.
landing_page.hero: Left-aligned heavy typography, right-aligned 3D/Abstract visual or high-quality image.
landing_page.features: Zig-zag layout with abundant negative space.

dashboard.grid: High Density Grid (Mode B). Sidebar fixed. Top bar sticky.
dashboard.widgets: Card-based, uniform height, clean borders (no shadows by default).
dashboard.wizard: Centered modal or split-screen (Left: Steps, Right: Form).

overrides.Card: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
overrides.Input: h-11 rounded-lg border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

custom_components.StatCard: Padded container with top-left icon, big metric number, and trend indicator.
custom_components.WizardStep: Horizontal progress bar with labeled steps. Current step highlighted in Primary Emerald.
custom_components.FeatureBento: Grid container with col-span-2 or col-span-1 variations for feature highlights.

hero_main.alt: Modern accounting workspace with laptop and notebook
hero_main.usage: Hero section background or split-screen visual

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-white/20 shadow-xl (Use for sticky headers/modals)
visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle noise overlay on backgrounds to prevent flatness.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border-slate-200 (Light) / border-slate-800 (Dark). No heavy borders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-600 or darker on white. Emerald-600 is safe for large text/buttons.
accessibility.focus: Focus ring must be offset-2 and emerald-500.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not center align long text blocks.
Forms must have validation messages (zod + react-hook-form).
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow this JSON strictly. Start by setting up the font and colors in tailwind.config.js. Then build the layout wrapper (Sidebar + Header). Then implement the Landing Page. Finally, build the Dashboard modules (Invoice, Users, Reports).
